com.sun.net.httpserver/Headers/get.name: get
com.sun.net.httpserver/Headers/get.description:
Returns the value to which the specified key is mapped,
ornullif this map contains no mapping for the key.

info.excerpt:
Returns the value to which the specified key is mapped,
ornullif this map contains no mapping for the key.

com.sun.net.httpserver/HttpContext/getAt.name: getAttributes

and other data toFiltermodules and to the context's exchange
handler.
